errors.name: InvalidEnvironment
errors.msg: Instruction is not allowed in production

errors.name: PositionNotInLiquidationRange
errors.msg: The position is not in liquidation range

errors.name: InstructionNotAllowed
errors.msg: Instruction is not allowed at this time

errors.name: MaxRegisteredResolvedStakingRoundReached
errors.msg: Max registered resolved staking round reached

errors.name: InvalidGovernanceProgram
errors.msg: Governance program do not match Cortex's one

errors.name: InvalidGovernanceRealm
errors.msg: Governance realm do not match Cortex's one

errors.name: InvalidVestingUnlockTime
errors.msg: Vesting unlock time is too close or passed

errors.name: UserStakeNotFound
errors.msg: The user stake account specified could not be found

errors.name: GenesisAlpLimitReached
errors.msg: Genesis ALP add liquidity limit reached

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleMissingSignature
errors.msg: Permissionless oracle update must be preceded by Ed25519 signature verification instruction

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleMalformedEd25519Data
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature verification data does not match expected format

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleSignerMismatch
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature was not signed by the oracle authority

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleMessageMismatch
errors.msg: Signed message does not match instruction params

errors.name: CustodyStableLockedAmountNotFound
errors.msg: Cannot find custody stable locked amount

errors.name: InsufficientBucketReserve
errors.msg: The bucket does not contain enough token for reserving this allocation

errors.name: UserNicknameTooShort
errors.msg: User nickname is less than 3 characters

errors.name: MaxRegisteredPool
errors.msg: The number of registered pool reached max amount

errors.name: MaxRegisteredCustodies
errors.msg: The number of registered custody reached max amount

errors.name: MaxCumulativeShortPositionSizeLimit
errors.msg: The short limit for this asset has been reached

errors.name: MaxCumulativeLongPositionSizeLimit
errors.msg: The long limit for this asset has been reached

errors.name: LockedStakeArrayFull
errors.msg: The max number of LockedStaking has been reached

errors.name: IndexOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Requested index is out of bounds

errors.name: InvalidCaller
errors.msg: The instruction must be call with a specific account as caller

errors.name: InvalidThreadId
errors.msg: (deprecated)The provided Sablier thread does not have the expected ID

errors.name: PythPriceExponentTooLargeIncurringPrecisionLoss
errors.msg: The exponent used for pyth price lead to high precision loss

errors.name: MissingClosePositionPrice
errors.msg: The close position price is mandatory

errors.name: PositionTooYoung
errors.msg: A position cannot be close right after open or update, a slight delay is enforced

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: The minimum amount of collateral posted to open a position is not met

errors.name: InvalidLockDuration
errors.msg: The provided lock duration isn't valid

errors.name: PositionAlreadyClosed
errors.msg: The position is already pending cleanup and close

errors.name: InvalidWallpaperOrProfilePictureOrTitle
errors.msg: Wallpaper or Profile Picture or Title is invalid

errors.name: WallpaperNotUnlocked
errors.msg: The requested wallpaper has not been unlocked by this user

errors.name: ProfilePictureNotUnlocked
errors.msg: The requested profile picture has not been unlocked by this user

errors.name: TitleNotUnlocked
errors.msg: The requested title has not been unlocked by this user

errors.name: UserNicknameInvalidFormat
errors.msg: User nickname expected format: Monster followed by digits

errors.name: TeamImmutable
errors.msg: The team can not be changed after being already set

errors.name: MissingOraclePrice
errors.msg: Missing at least one oracle price

errors.name: CustodyBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Custody amount is below minimum required

errors.name: CustodyAlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: Custody borrow rate params already migrated

errors.name: MarketStockSpecialEvent
errors.msg: Position is affected by a stock split or dividend event

errors.name: SwitchboardInvalidQueue
errors.msg: Switchboard quote account queue does not match expected queue

errors.name: SwitchboardFeedMappingDuplicate
errors.msg: Duplicate Switchboard feed mapping or duplicate feed update

errors.name: AdminTransferTooEarly
errors.msg: Admin transfer delay has not elapsed

errors.name: LiquidationPausedNoBackupOracle
errors.msg: Liquidation paused: no backup oracle has fresh price for this asset

errors.name: LiquidationPausedCircuitBreaker
errors.msg: Liquidation paused: backup oracle infrastructure is down

errors.name: InsufficientOracleCoverage
errors.msg: Insufficient oracle coverage for pool custodies under proposed multi_oracle_config

errors.name: OracleAccountCapacityExhausted
errors.msg: Oracle account does not have enough empty slots for the requested registrations

types.name: PriceData
docs: Individual price data within a batch.

types.name: ProfitAndLoss
docs: Specific to the codebase, this struct is used to store the profit and loss of a position.

fields.name: provider
docs: `OracleProvider as u8`. Must agree with `feed_id`'s range.

fields.name: feed_id
docs: Global feed id. Must lie within `provider.feed_id_range()`.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable feed name used by `custody.oracle` / `custody.trade_oracle`
lookups (e.g. "BTCUSD"). Must be non-default.
